compiled_state.title: EV-3b: rename TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR -> REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (alias window)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Rename TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR -> REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (slice of EV-3 / 15f6): the decoupled/relocated store dir is a SUPPORTED feature (decision var 4); prefer the REBAR_-prefixed name, honor the old name during a deprecation window with a warning.

## Scope / Deliverables
- The 7 env-read sites prefer REBAR_TRACKER_DIR, fall back to TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR (deprecation warning): config.py tracker_dir, _engine_support/reads.py, _engine_support/bridge_fsck.py, _engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_translate.py, _cli/_init.py, _cli/__init__.py (2 gate checks).
- A single shared resolver helper to avoid duplicating the prefer/alias/warn logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] REBAR_TRACKER_DIR honored everywhere TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR was; old name aliased + warned during deprecation
- [ ] Relocated-tracker tests pass under both names; full non-integration suite green

comments.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 479e4ac0). Renamed TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR -> REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (relocated/decoupled store is a supported feature, decision var 4). AC1 (REBAR_TRACKER_DIR honored everywhere; old name aliased + warned): new config.tracker_dir_override() returns REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (canonical) or the deprecated TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR with a WARN-ONCE deprecation message (_warn_once_legacy_env/_WARNED_LEGACY_ENV, cleared by reset_config_cache). All 6 env-read sites route through it: config.tracker_dir, reads.tracker_dir, bridge_fsck, reconciler inbound_translate, and the 3 _cli auto-init presence gates; the only remaining os.environ read of the old name is INSIDE tracker_dir_override. KEY: warn-once is required because tracker_dir is on a hot path AND the logger.warning leaks to stderr via Python last-resort handler — a per-call warning would corrupt CLI golden-stderr tests. AC2 (tests pass under both names): migrated the 4 test files that SET the tracker dir to REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (so the deprecation warning fires ONLY in the dedicated alias test, never in golden contexts); isolation fixtures also delenv REBAR_TRACKER_DIR for symmetry; new test_config_tracker_dir.py covers canonical/alias/canonical-wins/warn-once/default/reads-resolver. Full offline suite green: 1947 passed, 9 skipped. Subagent review: correct + safe, NO critical/major (verified canonical-wins, warn-once reset, no missed sites, no subprocess handoff of the old name, reconciler import resolves, verify gate untouched; applied the minor delenv-symmetry hardening it suggested). Parent 15f6 still blocked by EV-3c (reconciler/LLM tunables + id-guard value-flip).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
